attack_advisory.executive_summary: Analysis identified 2 viable attack paths. 1 paths have HIGH success probability. Recommended initial approach: Direct Web Application Attack (No WAF). Intelligence quality: moderate.

attack_paths.name: JWT Token Manipulation Attack
attack_paths.description: Exploit weak JWT implementation for authentication bypass
steps: Capture JWT tokens from authentication responses
Check for weak signing secrets (brute force with common wordlists)
Modify payload claims (user role, permissions, expiration)
Replay modified tokens for privilege escalation
attack_paths.impact: Authentication bypass or privilege escalation to admin access
attack_paths.intelligence_basis: JWT/Bearer authentication mechanism detected in tech stack

attack_paths.name: Direct Web Application Attack (No WAF)
steps: No WAF detected - direct application access possible
Perform active vulnerability scanning (SQLi, XSS, IDOR)
Test for common web vulnerabilities without rate limiting concerns
attack_paths.impact: Full application compromise including database access
attack_paths.intelligence_basis: No WAF/CDN protection detected - direct access to application

defense_evasion_tips: Use rotating residential proxies to avoid IP-based blocking
Implement realistic timing delays between requests (3-30 seconds)
Randomize user agents and HTTP headers to mimic legitimate traffic
Monitor for honeypot indicators (fake admin panels, trap endpoints)
Use HTTPS and encrypted channels for command & control
Segment attack infrastructure from personal/corporate networks

stop_conditions.evidence: Only low-value targets remaining - not worth continued recon

recommendations: Begin attack execution on highest-priority assets
